CustomObject.description: Per-circuit litigation risk weights seeded from PermitTEC v0.1 corpus. Used by the Litigation Risk Scoring Flow to weight the geographic component of the composite score.
CustomObject.label: NEPA Circuit Risk Weight

fields.description: Human-readable circuit label (e.g., 9th Circuit, D.C. Circuit, 4th Circuit).
fields.label: Circuit Label

fields.description: Short key matched against Program.nepa_circuit__c (e.g., 9th, DC, 4th).
fields.label: Circuit Key

fields.description: Number of PermitTEC litigation cases in this circuit.
fields.label: Case Count

fields.description: Points added to composite litigation risk score for this circuit. Scale: 0-20 points. SubscriberControlled so agencies can tune weights without a package update.
fields.label: Risk Points

fields.description: True when the circuit loss rate is derived from fewer than 5 cases in the PermitTEC corpus. When true, the NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer populates nepa_small_sample_warning__c on IndividualApplication, surfacing a warning banner that the circuit estimate is directional only.
fields.label: Low Data Confidence

fields.description: Median litigation duration in months for NEPA cases heard in this circuit, from CourtListener Stage 14 pipeline. Independent of outcome — used as a cost-exposure signal, not a win-probability signal. Surfaced in the risk factors display alongside the win-probability score.
fields.label: Median Litigation Months

fields.description: Date this record version becomes effective. Flows compare inp_EvaluationDate (= nepa_start_date__c on the IA) against this: only records where Effective_Start_Date__c IS NULL OR <= EvaluationDate are returned. Null = effective from the beginning of time.
fields.label: Effective Start Date

fields.description: Date after which this record version is no longer effective (EO 14270 sunset compliance). Flows filter: Sunset_Date__c IS NULL OR >= EvaluationDate. Null = no sunset.
fields.label: Sunset Date
